{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603232052485B57673D0379B2C364B3"}"},"total":9},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7615544641584284441","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"加油，很好看。希望后面女主不会被官方约束起来，现在看倒没什么，希望后面不会变"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1773135633,"group_id":"7613224507553090584","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NwCROrgIupuRDnMQR0yuAr6wr0CMygkmxlAHTq58JwCv","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/1437c63bc45b464bb1cc6cd6a7b0d4f1~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"3839921401628171","user_name":"平空气人"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3839921401628171","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7613224507553090584","book_info":{"abstract":"玄学轻松捉鬼文+无cp
时青蘅，闲散千年的穷鬼，
无香火无墓地，
躺的坑还是亲手刨的，
混吃等死，倒也逍遥自在，
谁知一道天雷劈下，
魂魄直接砸进一个刚死的穷丫头身体里。
更惨的是—
她出不去了！
从此告别鬼生，被动做人。
没学历、没背景、没工作、穷得叮当响，
为了活下去，只能到处找工作赚钱。
可谁能想到，
我本是鬼，天生克鬼，
往那一站，就能赶鬼。
世人满眼崇拜：大师厉害！
鬼怪瑟瑟发抖：大佬饶命！
我：？？？
我真的只想谋生，不想当大师啊！！！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/6a5529e0ef3d7ce47e1e81e7347ef7d1~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"冰糖雪梨加奶茶","author_id":"","book_id":"7613224507553090584","book_name":"只想谋生，世人却管我叫捉鬼大师","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#504848","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"6665人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":267,"name":"现言脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=267&name=现言脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":3,"name":"现代言情","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=3&name=现代言情&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":32,"name":"幻想言情","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=32&name=幻想言情&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":867,"name":"捉鬼","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=867&name=捉鬼&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":852,"name":"魂穿","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=852&name=魂穿&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":392,"name":"无CP","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=392&name=无CP&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":1455,"name":"风水秘术","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1455&name=风水秘术&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7613224916401259032","read_count":"6665","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"155222"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"66","tags":"现言脑洞,现代言情,幻想言情,捉鬼,魂穿,无CP,风水秘术","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/6a5529e0ef3d7ce47e1e81e7347ef7d1~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779454368&x-signature=4xtPdhH67eW3zNAbLMJWv5dTfkI%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"54124776363","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"44"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603232052485B57673D0379B2C364B3"}"}
